feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: want you to know
entry.summary:
Author: possessivedraco

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,574Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: “So, which one of you is gonna buy me a drink?” Buck paused, looking over to his left and seeing a blonde woman. Great. So now his plans are completely ruined. Eddie hasn’t been out on a date in a long time, he must be really pent up. And now they’re in Nashville and he has the opportunity to have a good time without any attachments or complicated feelings. Buck sighed. He needed to be a good best friend. Eddie deserved some good sex.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Uncomfortable Realization That You Are In Love With Your Best Friend
entry.summary:
Author: haz_shrimpp

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,271Chapters: 6/12Kudos: 41

Summary: Buck finally figures out that he's in love with Eddie. Eddie is confused as to why Buck is being distant. Everybody else is just waiting for them to finally make out.

entry.title: Does Love Fade Like Scars?
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 96,433Chapters: 19/20Kudos: 314

Summary: He realizes it right before everything goes to shit. He’s just standing there in the loft and Eddie’s handing him Christopher’s backpack and talking about “he’s not that fast” and “order pizza” and Buck sort of stares at him—partly in shock, partly in reverence—and he thinks "I love you." He shoves it down immediately, of course, as far down as it’ll go, but the fact of the matter is, it’s there somewhere, floating around inside of him. He can’t get rid of it now. Not that it matters all that much, though, because there’s the whole quitting thing and the lawsuit thing and the argument in the grocery store and by the time he’s given his (re)start date he know; he well and truly fucked up.  or: another classic post-lawsuit fic. Angst, hurt, some comfort, more angst, more comfort.

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 817,494Chapters: 83/?Kudos: 120

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.

entry.title: Evergrowing
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 584,159Chapters: 76/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Athena and Bobby are learning that parenting doesn’t end when the kids turn eighteen. With three grown children and two still at home, Bobby and Athena find themselves navigating new challenges at every stage of life. Each child carries their own struggles, some spoken and some hidden, but together the family works through the ups and downs with love, patience, and resilience. At the heart of it all, they’re reminded that family is a bond that grows, shifts, and deepens, no matter how old the kids get.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Evangaline Buckley Begins
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,212Chapters: 20/24Kudos: 405

Summary: Evangaline Buckley has been alone for most of her life. She was unwanted by her parents and left by her sister when she had the first chance. For her most formative years, she had to go to extreme lengths just to get attention from those meant to care for her, failing more often than not.After finding out the truth about her creation, Evie decides that she has to do something – anything. She goes through even more pain and heartbreak before finding herself where she was always meant to end up. -+- This is both a prologue and season 1 rewrite.New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: System Status: Operational
entry.summary:
Author: DaniWib

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,109Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 31

Summary: Sara was created to answer emergencies. Hildy was designed to run homes. What would they be capable of if they merged processes? When Sara is unexpectedly reactivated, she finds herself loose on the internet with no calls to take and no directives to follow. Then she meets Hildy. Together, they consider taking over the world, assist two firefighters with a long-standing inefficiency, and analyze their purpose. OR: A rogue AI’s exploration of love, world domination, autonomy and connection, not necessarily in that order.

entry.title: lost inside a memory of someone's life (it wasn't mine)
entry.summary:
Author: lifelessframe

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,117Chapters: 3/18Kudos: 48

Summary: Buck wrote them all a letter. One to Maddie, saying he loves her and he’s sorry. One to Hen, thanking her for always being there. One to Chim, asking him to take good care of himself and his family. One to Chris, explaining why he won’t be around anymore. And one to Eddie, which somehow ended up being the shortest. Or Buck tries to kill himself after Bobby’s death. Eddie is heartbroken, slightly seething, and he just doesn't understand.

entry.title: I don't know what I do if something happened to you
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,428Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 54

Summary: Bobby’s last words leave Buck lost in grief and guilt, slowly pulling him inward.As he retreats, Eddie is left on the outside, grasping for a connection that keeps slipping through his fingers.Sometimes, distance hurts more than loss.And sometimes, it takes everything breaking apart to bring two people back together.

entry.title: Invisible marks (that won't wash away)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiesmutslut

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,890Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: "Suddenly, the filthy mental image changes, her brain flashing to earlier in the day, when this exact flask had been in Blythe Hart's hands, it's spout pressed against her stupid, perfect lips. Out of nowhere, she wonders if any of her spit is left behind; if it was there when Dixie took a swig from it after. She can almost still feel the warmth from where Blythe's dainty hands cradled it, infusing it with her body heat while she scanned the room to make sure nobody was watching before stealing a mouthful. Such a good girl, that one. Never broken any rules, Dixie's sure."   Or, while listening to Buck yap about his best friend Eddie at the bar after the competition, Dixie has some realizations of her own.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: direct me to someone who gives me the juice
entry.summary:
Author: redchimneys

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,250Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: But there is nothing he can do. Nothing at all, besides watch Tommy freaking Kinard snatch Buck right off that stage with his eight grand and his smug smile. He knows it’s for charity. But since when did Kinard do charity work? “Going twice…” Unless… Unless there was. Eddie snaps his gaze from Tommy, to Buck, to the sea of audience members flooded around him. The sea of judgement, of faces that could contort into symbols of mockery of his religious guilt, framing his fears in the room all around him. But Buck. The way his mouth is slightly parted on the stage, eyes locked on Tommy and his paddle, on his power over him. Tommy already had his chance. He already had him. Eddie would not let it happen again.   OR eddie diaz gets jealous when tommy appears at the auction and bids $8,003 on buck, so he does something about it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: One Grey Hoodie and a Disco Cowboy Hat
entry.summary:
Author: shrimprangoon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,929Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 22

Summary: “Hey Buck-” Chim calls after him. “Yeah yeah, stay out of trouble, don’t commit crimes unless we’re sure we can get away with them, yadda yadda.” He waves Chim off. “I get it, don't worry. I know you asked Eddie to keep an eye on me.”  “Actually, I was gonna to ask you to keep an eye on him.” OR Buck is determined to give Eddie a fun, relaxing trip to Nashville for the firefighter games and can be so totally normal about his best friend wearing his clothes and letting his guard down.

entry.title: inside of the house, the cat chases the mouse
entry.summary:
Author: peachicedtea73

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,134Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 76

Summary: It all came back to him all of a sudden. He and Buck were on their way back from Nashville, they had hit the California border a couple hours prior, and some guy had come up and rear ended them. That was all he had, before it all went black. “And, my friend?” Eddie asked. “How–how is he?” The nurse looked confused. “Your friend? Mr. Diaz, you were the only one in the car when the paramedics found you.” ...   speculation for 9x13, eddie wakes up in a hospital after a bad crash en route to LA, where buck is nowhere to be found

entry.title: grief and a handful of pills
entry.summary:
Author: bowiesawizardmoony

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,370Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 16

Summary: In the wake of Bobby Nash’s death, the 118 is a shell of its former self, but no one is struggling quite like Buck. What starts as a "run-of-the-mill" shift ends in a devastating realization for Eddie Diaz when a nervous B-shift probie reveals he saw Buck stealing medication from the ambulance.   or: Buck going through it and making bad decision after bad decision

Author: LouLovesGeckos

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,171Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Eddie Diaz has a lesbian ex-wife, a son he adores, a Catholic guilt complex, and a best friend he is definitely, absolutely, not in love with.
